boundary.learned_model_role: rank candidates by learned structured features
boundary.verifier_role: typed channels decide accept/reject/abstain for both arms

claim: On the same structured adversarial candidate cases, the learned candidate model is compared against exported-candidate confidence ordering while typed verification remains proof authority.
known_limitations: Structured synthetic adversarial cases, not broad natural-language evaluation.
Exported arm is an export-adapter confidence baseline, not a fresh live TensionLM generation run.
No live TensionLM runtime is loaded.
The result measures proposal/ranking quality under typed verification, not general reasoning capability.
scope: Same-case comparison using the v2.0 learned candidate model and an exported-candidate confidence baseline generated through the existing TensionLM export adapter; no live TensionLM runtime is loaded.
